sections.content: Target now at top of left section, above the player. Let me try moving DOWN to overlap the player - this might be the goal.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current position
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'O':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Target orange: rows[{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols[{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}]")
    if n['color'] in ('W', 'w'):
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Player: rows[{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols[{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}]")

# Try moving DOWN to overlap player
action(['DOWN'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
